title: M-Tokens
description: M-Tokens is a small resource pack that adds a set of 60+ hand drawn tokens to minecraft java edition. The tokens serve no purpose other than the one you create. You can use them as in-game coins, award them to other players on your server.
body:
# M-TOKENS

M-Tokens is a small resource pack that adds a set of 60+ hand drawn tokens to minecraft java edition. The tokens serve no purpose other than the one you create. You can use them as in-game coins, award them to other players on your server, or just "collect them all".
___
![Image1](https://m-tokens.ekalia.com/img/slide1.jpg)
___
![Image2](https://m-tokens.ekalia.com/img/slide2.jpg)
___
![Image3](https://m-tokens.ekalia.com/img/slide3.jpg)
___
![Image4](https://m-tokens.ekalia.com/img/slide4.jpg)
___

On the [official website](https://m-tokens.ekalia.com/) you can find a list of all the available tokens, as well as the commands to be used to give them to players

Along with a resource pack that adds tokens as items to the game, an optional datapack is also available in the official website which allows the tokens to be dropped by mobs. This also adds a small chance for every token to be dropped as a "shiny" version.
